# Metadata Template

Use this as a checklist when adding an article part.

- `slug`: stable and URL-safe
- `title`: human-readable and specific
- `description`: concise summary for SEO and social previews
- `publishDate`: consistent format with existing entries
- `readTime`: consistent style (for example, `8 min read`)
- `canonical`: absolute URL for the article
- `ogImage`: valid image path/URL
- `partNumber` or sequence fields: consistent with series order
